hero.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
hero.reason: RTK是Rust CLI代理，大幅减少LLM令牌消耗，极度匹配。

summary.zh: 这是一个CLI代理，可将常见开发命令的LLM令牌消耗降低60-90%，单一Rust二进制文件，零依赖，效率极高。
summary.en: RTK is a CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. It is a single Rust binary with zero dependencies, offering a lightweight and efficient solution for developers to save on API costs.

items.description: Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.
items.reason: Warp是Rust编写的代理开发环境，完美契合终端UI和开发者工具主题。

summary.zh: Warp 是一个基于人工智能的现代化终端，旨在取代传统终端，提供智能命令补全和协作功能。
summary.en: Warp is an AI-powered modern terminal that replaces traditional terminals, offering smart command completions and collaboration features as an agentic development environment.

items.description: 🛰️ A CLI tool for tracking token usage from OpenCode, Claude Code, 🦞OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot), Pi, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, AmpCode, Factory Droid, Kimi, and more! • 🏅Global Leaderboard + 2D/3D Contributions Graph
items.reason: Tokscale是Rust CLI跟踪AI令牌使用，完美匹配LLM工具。

summary.zh: 一个追踪多种AI编程工具Token使用量的CLI工具，配有全球排行榜和3D贡献图。
summary.en: tokscale is a Rust-based CLI tool that tracks token usage from popular AI coding assistants like OpenCode, Claude Code, and Cursor. It features a global leaderboard and 2D/3D contribution graphs, making it easy to monitor and compare usage across different platforms.

items.reason: jcode是Rust编码代理工具，直接匹配LLM工具和开发者工具。

summary.zh: JCode 是一个用 Rust 编写的编码代理框架，旨在替代传统编码助手，支持多语言代码生成与实时调试。
summary.en: JCode is a coding agent harness written in Rust, designed to replace traditional coding assistants with multi-language code generation and real-time debugging, offering a seamless integration for developers.

items.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.
items.reason: cc-switch是Rust跨平台AI助手，契合LLM工具和终端UI。

summary.zh: 跨平台桌面一体式助手，整合Claude Code、Codex等CLI工具，支持多模型切换与配置管理。
summary.en: A cross-platform desktop all-in-one assistant tool that integrates multiple CLI tools including Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw, and Gemini CLI. It allows users to switch between different AI coding assistants seamlessly, manage configurations, and streamline workflows. Notable feature: provides a unified interface for multiple command-line AI tools, eliminating the need to switch between separate terminals or contexts.

profile.notes:
Prefers low-level, performance-sensitive, developer-focused projects.
Not interested in SaaS or marketing tooling.
